message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
autonumber "<b>[0]"

participant "JCallGraph" as JCG {
}
box "" #LightBlue2
  participant CliManager 
end box 

group loop [forEach]
    group alt "[isDirectory() and getName().endsWith(".class")"]
        create ClassParser
        
        note right of ZipEntry : Jar en formato stream 
        
        activate Cp1
        new ClassParser(String, String) ->>Cp1#LineSolid:black;BackGroundColor:white;line.dashed:green;text.color:red;font.size=35
        return cp = ClassParser
    
        
       
       ' getClassVisitor()->ClassVisi'
      apply(ClassParser)->Runner
      
     start-> Runner
     
     
      
    
   
   end
   
  
    
    
    
    
    
    

@enduml
